entry.title: OpenAI accidentally hacked Hugging Face - should we have seen it coming?
entry.summary: Expert assessments and cyber benchmarks led us to expect that frontier models were capable of executing this kind of cyberattack

entry.title: AI detectors rarely flag human writing, but sometimes miss AI text imitating real authors
What you need to know about AI energy use
entry.summary: A guide to AI's growing energy demands — why a single chatbot query uses less energy than many fear, and the reality of AI's impacts on climate and local communities.

entry.title: Contributions to OpenAI's Codex codebase show signs of AI uplift
The missing half of AI futurism debates
entry.summary: Why we should think a little harder about what it takes to build a Dyson Sphere

entry.title: Disclosure of serious cyber vulnerabilities spiked around the release of Claude Mythos Preview
GPT-4 led in ECI far longer than any other model
AI doesn't get better at this board game with practice
entry.summary: Our latest benchmark suggests AI struggles to learn from experience

entry.title: MirrorCode: What's the largest software project AI can complete on its own?
entry.summary: MirrorCode is Epoch AI's benchmark for long-horizon coding: AI can reimplement entire programs end-to-end, with no access to the original source code.

entry.title: What we learned from 1,604 Chinese AI job postings
entry.summary: Inferring Chinese AI labs’ strategies from their job descriptions
